verses.1: Then Deborah and Barak the son of Abinoam sang on that day, saying,
verses.2: “Because the leaders took the lead in Israel,
verses.4: “LORD, when you went out of Seir,
verses.5: The mountains quaked at the LORD’s presence,
verses.6: “In the days of Shamgar the son of Anath,
verses.9: My heart is toward the governors of Israel,
verses.10: “Speak, you who ride on white donkeys,
verses.11: Far from the noise of archers, in the places of drawing water,
verses.13: “Then a remnant of the nobles and the people came down.
verses.14: Those whose root is in Amalek came out of Ephraim,
verses.15: The princes of Issachar were with Deborah.
verses.16: Why did you sit among the sheepfolds?
verses.18: Zebulun was a people that jeopardized their lives to the death;
verses.20: From the sky the stars fought.
verses.21: The river Kishon swept them away,
verses.22: Then the horse hoofs stamped because of the prancing,
verses.26: She put her hand to the tent peg,
verses.27: At her feet he bowed, he fell, he lay.
verses.28: “Through the window she looked out, and cried:
verses.30: ‘Have they not found, have they not divided the plunder?
verses.31: “So let all your enemies perish, LORD,
